The '''56th [[Berlin International Film Festival]]''' was held from 9 to 19 February 2006.<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2006/01_jahresblatt_2006/01_Jahresblatt_2006.html |title=56TH BERLIN INTERNATIONAL FILM FESTIVAL FEBRUARY 9 - 19, 2006 |access-date=10 June 2014 |work=berlinale.de | archive-url= https://web.archive.org/web/20131104212749/http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2006/01_jahresblatt_2006/01_Jahresblatt_2006.html| archive-date=4 November 2013 | url-status= live}}</ref> The festival opened with ''[[Snow Cake]]'' by [[Marc Evans]].<ref>{{cite news|url=https://query.nytimes.com/gst/fullpage.html?res=9F05E7DF143EF93BA35751C0A9609C8B63 |title=Arts, Briefly |work=The New York Times |date=8 February 2006 |access-date=10 June 2014}}</ref> Digitally restored version of [[Sam Peckinpah]]'s 1973 film ''[[Pat Garrett and Billy the Kid]]'' served as the closing film.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2006/08_pressemitteilungen_2006/08_Pressemitteilungen_2006-Detail_2868.html |title=BERLINALE FINALE: PAT GARRETT & BILLY THE KID: SPECIAL EDITION |access-date=10 June 2014 |work=berlinale.de | archive-url= https://web.archive.org/web/20140908204928/https://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2006/08_pressemitteilungen_2006/08_Pressemitteilungen_2006-Detail_2868.html| archive-date=8 September 2014 | url-status= live}}</ref> British actress [[Charlotte Rampling]] was selected as the head of the jury.<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.screendaily.com/charlotte-rampling-to-be-jury-president-at-berlinale-2006/4025346.article|title=Charlotte Rampling to be jury president at Berlinale 2006 |access-date=10 June 2014}}</ref>

The [[Golden Bear]] was awarded to ''[[Grbavica (film)|Grbavica: The Land of My Dreams]]'' directed by [[Jasmila Žbanić]].<ref name="PRIZES" />

The retrospective was dedicated to the film actresses of [[1950s in film|1950s]], titled ''Dream Girls. Film Stars in the 1950s'' was shown at the festival.<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/das_festival/sektionen_sonderveranstaltungen/retrospektive/index.html#|title=RETROSPECTIVE|access-date=28 August 2014|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170304113847/http://www.berlinale.de/en/das_festival/sektionen_sonderveranstaltungen/retrospektive/index.html|archive-date=4 March 2017|url-status=dead|df=dmy-all}}</ref> More than 186,000 tickets were sold at the festival with visitors from 120 countries, including 3,800 journalists, attended the festival.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2006/08_pressemitteilungen_2006/08_Pressemitteilungen_2006-Detail_3014.htmll |title=THE 56TH BERLIN INTERNATIONAL FILM FESTIVAL COMES TO A SUCCESSFUL CLOSE |access-date=10 June 2014 |work=berlinale.de | archive-url= https://web.archive.org/web/20140908213219/https://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2006/08_pressemitteilungen_2006/08_Pressemitteilungen_2006-Detail_3014.html| archive-date=8 September 2014 | url-status= live}}</ref>

==Juries==
[[File:Charlotte Rampling 2016.jpg|thumb|244x244px|[[Charlotte Rampling]], Jury President]]
The following people were announced as being on the jury for the festival:<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2006/04_jury_2006/04_Jury_2006.html |title=JURIES 2006 |access-date=10 June 2014 |work=berlinale.de | archive-url= https://web.archive.org/web/20131023110715/http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2006/04_jury_2006/04_Jury_2006.html| archive-date=23 October 2013 | url-status= live}}</ref>

=== Main Competition ===
* [[Charlotte Rampling]], British actress - Jury President
* [[Matthew Barney]], American director and artist
* [[Yash Chopra]], Indian director and producer 
* [[Marleen Gorris]], Dutch filmmaker
* [[Janusz Kamiński]], Polish director of photography
* [[Armin Mueller-Stahl]], German actor
* [[Fred Roos]], American producer
* [[Lee Young-ae]], South Korean actress

=== Best First Feature Award ===
* [[Valentina Cervi]], Italian actress
* [[Goran Paskaljević]], Serbian director
* [[Hans Weingartner]], Austrian director and producer

=== Short Films Competition ===
* Mariela Besuievsky, Spanish producer
* [[Florian Gallenberger]], German director and screenwriter
* Jung-Wan Oh, South Korean producer

==Official Awards==
[[File:Jasmila Zbanic KVIFF.jpg|thumb|200px|[[Jasmila Žbanić]], winner of the Golden Bear at the festival]]

=== Main Competition ===
The following prizes were awarded by the Jury:<ref name="PRIZES">{{cite web|url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2006/03_preistr_ger_2006/03_Preistraeger_2006.html |title=PRIZES & HONOURS 2006|access-date=10 June 2014 |work=berlinale.de| archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20131015121547/http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2006/03_preistr_ger_2006/03_Preistraeger_2006.html| archive-date=15 October 2013 | url-status= live}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.berlinale.de/media/pdf_word/pm_1/56_berlinale_de/PRESSEDOSSIER-1-2006.pdf |title=Awards and Announcements|access-date=10 June 2014 |work=berlinale.de| archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20140908210302/https://www.berlinale.de/media/pdf_word/pm_1/56_berlinale_de/PRESSEDOSSIER-1-2006.pdf| archive-date=8 September 2014 | url-status= live}}</ref>
*[[Golden Bear]]: ''[[Grbavica (film)|Grbavica: The Land of My Dreams]]'' by [[Jasmila Žbanić]]
*[[Silver Bear Grand Jury Prize|Silver Bear for Jury Grand Prix]]:
** ''[[Offside (2006 Iranian film)|Offside]]'' by [[Jafar Panahi]]
** ''[[En soap]]'' by [[Pernille Fischer Christensen]]
*[[Silver Bear for Best Actor]]: [[Moritz Bleibtreu]] for ''[[Atomised (film)|The Elementary Particles]]''
*[[Silver Bear for Best Actress]]: [[Sandra Hüller]] for ''[[Requiem (2006 film)|Requiem]]''
*[[Silver Bear for Best Director]]: [[Michael Winterbottom]] & [[Mat Whitecross]] for ''[[The Road to Guantanamo]]''
*'''Silver Bear for Outstanding Artistic Contribution''': [[Jürgen Vogel]] for ''[[The Free Will]]''
*'''Silver Bear for Best Film Music''': ''[[Isabella (2006 film)|Isabella]]'' by [[Peter Kam]]
*[[Alfred Bauer Prize]]: [[Rodrigo Moreno]] for ''[[El custodio|The Minder]]''

=== [[Honorary Golden Bear]] ===
*[[Andrzej Wajda]]
*[[Ian McKellen]]

=== [[Short Film Golden Bear|Golden Bear for Best Short Film]] ===
*''Never Like the First Time!'' by [[Jonas Odell]]
**'''Honorable Mention''': [[Maryam Keshavarz]] for ''El día que morí''

=== Berlinale Camera ===
*[[Michael Ballhaus]]
*[[Jürgen Böttcher]]
*Laurence Kardish
*Peter B. Schumann
*Hans Helmut Prinzler

=== Best First Feature ===
*''[[En soap]]'' by [[Pernille Fischer Christensen]] (director) & Lars Bredo Rahbek (producer)

== Independent Awards ==

=== Panorama Audience Award ===
*[[Tomer Heymann]] for ''[[Paper Dolls]]''
*'''Short Film''': [[Talya Lavie]] for ''[[The Substitute]]''

=== Crystal Bear ===
*'''Best Short Film''': Cameron B. Alyasin for ''[[Never an Absolution]]''
**'''Special Mention''': Irina Boiko for ''The Thief''
*'''Best Feature Film''': [[Niels Arden Oplev]] for ''[[We Shall Overcome]]''
**'''Special Mention''': [[Auraeus Solito]] for ''[[The Blossoming of Maximo Oliveros]]''
*'''14Plus Best Feature Film''': Henry Meyer for ''Four Weeks in June''
**'''Special Mention''': [[Claude Gagnon]] for ''[[Kamataki]]''

=== Deutsches Kinderhilfswerk Grand Prix ===
*''[[The Blossoming of Maximo Oliveros]]'' by [[Auraeus Solito]]
*'''Special Award''': ''A Fish with a Smile'' by C. Jay Shih
*'''Special Mention''':
**'''Best Short Film''': ''Vika'' by Tsivia Barkai
**'''Best Feature Film''': ''I Am'' by [[Dorota Kędzierzawska]]

=== [[Teddy Award|Teddy]] ===
*'''Best Short Film''': ''El día que morí'' by [[Maryam Keshavarz]]
*'''Best Documentary Film''': ''[[Beyond Hatred]]'' by Olivier Meyrou
*'''Best Feature Film''': ''[[The Blossoming of Maximo Oliveros]]'' by [[Auraeus Solito]]
*'''Jury Award''': Patrick Carpentier for ''[[Combat (film)|Combat]]''

=== FIPRSECI Prize ===
*'''Competition''': ''[[Requiem (2006 film)|Requiem]]'' by [[Hans-Christian Schmid]]
*'''Forum of New Cinema''': [[So Yong Kim]] for ''[[In Between Days]]''
*'''Panorama''': ''[[Knallhart]]'' by [[Detlev Buck]]

=== Prize of the Ecumenical Jury ===
*'''Competition''': ''[[Grbavica (film)|Grbavica]]'' by [[Jasmila Žbanić]]
*'''Forum of New Cinema''': ''[[Conversations on a Sunday Afternoon]]'' by Khalo Matabane
*'''Panorama''': ''[[The Collector]]'' by [[Feliks Falk]]

=== C.I.C.A.E. Award ===
*'''Forum of New Cinema''': ''[[Close to Home (film)|Close to Home]]'' by Dalia Hager
*'''Panorama''': [[Zhang Yuan (director)|Zhang Yuan]] for ''[[Little Red Flowers]]''

=== Netpac Award ===
*''[[Dear Pyongyang]]'' by [[Yong-hi Yang]]

=== Prix UIP Berlin ===
*''The Fence'' by Ricardo Íscar

=== Label Europa Cinemas ===
*[[Detlev Buck]] for ''[[Knallhart]]''

=== Caligari Film Award ===
*[[Ben Hopkins]] for ''37 Uses for a Dead Sheep''

=== DIALOGUE en Perspective ===
*[[Bülent Akinci]] for ''[[Running on Empty (2006 film)|Running on Empty]]''
**'''Special Mention''': Florian Gaag for ''[[Wholetrain]]''

=== Talent Movie of the Week ===
*Phillip Van for ''High Maintenance''

=== Berlin Today Award ===
*Anna Azevedo for ''BerlinBall''

=== Score Competition ===
*Alasdair Reid

=== Manfred Salzgeber Award ===
*[[Tomer Heymann]] for ''[[Paper Dolls]]''

=== DAAD Short Film Award ===
*Rony Sasson for ''[[Swanettes]]''

=== Peace Film Award ===
*[[Jasmila Žbanić]] for ''[[Grbavica (film)|Grbavica]]''

=== Amnesty International Film Prize ===
*Masoud Arif Salih for ''Narcissus Blossom''

=== Wolfgang Staudte Award ===
*[[Tizza Covi]] for ''Babooska''

=== Prize of the Guild of German Art House Cinemas ===
*[[Matthias Glasner]] for ''[[The Free Will]]''

=== Femina-Film-Prize ===
*Yasmin Khalifa for ''Bye Bye Berlusconi!''

=== Reader Jury of the "Berliner Morgenpost" ===
*[[Robert Altman]] for ''[[A Prairie Home Companion]]''

=== Reader Jury of the "Berliner Zeitung" ===
*[[Shion Sono]] for ''[[Strange Circus]]''

=== Reader Jury of the "Siegessäule" ===
*[[Tomer Heymann]] for ''[[Paper Dolls]]''
